data.body: AC amendment: MARKETPLACE_BASE injection for test isolation — Implementation must accept MARKETPLACE_BASE env var as an override for the marketplace path probe (e.g., MARKETPLACE_BASE=$TMPDIR/mock-dso enables test isolation without hitting real ~/.claude/plugins/). Default to ~/.claude when unset. Add Verify: grep -q 'MARKETPLACE_BASE' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
